ad_copy.headline: Elevate Spaces with Heritage Craftsmanship
ad_copy.subheadline: Trusted by Leaders, Loved by Communities
ad_copy.body_copy: Discover premium architecture that blends timeless design with modern innovation. Build tomorrow’s legacy today.

variations.label: Variation A - Primary
variations.headline: Elevate Spaces with Heritage Craftsmanship
variations.body_copy: Premium architecture that blends timeless design with modern innovation.

variations.label: Variation B - Emotional
variations.headline: Build a Legacy That Inspires
variations.body_copy: Craft spaces that echo your values and invite generations to cherish.

variations.label: Variation C - Direct
variations.headline: Premium Architecture for Tomorrow’s Leaders
variations.body_copy: Achieve functional excellence with our expert design solutions.

visual_direction.layout_description: Vertical square with a central architectural rendering, flanked by subtle text blocks. The image is split into three vertical layers: top‑edged logo, middle‑centered illustration, bottom‑grounded CTA.
visual_direction.composition: The central image occupies the middle 60% of the frame, horizontally centered. Upper third holds the headline in bold Helvetica; lower 20% contains the CTA button. Fine borders use secondary color accents.
visual_direction.color_usage: Background in #E6D5C3 blending into #351E1C at the corners. Text in #1F1F1F with #DCDAD9 highlights. Accent lines in #DCDAD9 outline key elements.
visual_direction.typography_usage: Headline 48pt bold Helvetica #1F1F1F; subheadline 32pt light Helvetica #351E1C; body 20pt regular Helvetica #1F1F1F; CTA button 24pt bold Helvetica #E6D5C3 on #351E1C background.
visual_direction.imagery_style: High‑contrast architectural blueprint overlay on a realistic façade photo, rendered in muted tones to emphasize professionalism.
visual_direction.mood: Clean, confident, and inspiring, evoking trust and aspiration.

image_generation_prompt.stable_diffusion: A premium architectural rendering layered over a realistic façade photo, subtle blueprint overlay, high contrast, muted tones, square format, 1080x1080, Helvetica text overlay, #351E1C and #1F1F1F colors, professional style
image_generation_prompt.midjourney: premium architecture rendering over real façade, high contrast, muted palette, 1080x1080, square --ar 1:1 --v 5 --quality 2
image_generation_prompt.negative_prompt: cartoon, overexposed, text clutter, bright colors, low resolution

layout_spec.spacing_notes: Safe zone 50px margin from edges, 30px between headline and body, 20px above CTA

brand_compliance_notes: Uses core color palette, Helvetica font, professional tone, avoids overly graphic elements. Maintains brand trustworthiness by showcasing high-quality imagery and clear messaging.
ab_testing_tips: Test headline variability (A: heritage vs. legacy), color contrast, CTA placement (bottom vs. overlay), and image versus photo dominance to measure engagement lift.
